blurb: Consultancy with public-sector AI thought leadership. Launch coverage uses first-party government-roadmap AI insight.

publications.title: A Government Roadmap On How To Navigate The AI Revolution
publications.summary: Oliver Wyman sets out how governments can harness generative AI operationally and strategically, part of its Quotient AI practice and public-sector AI advisory positioning.

publications.title: How AI for enterprise legacy IT runs operations at scale
publications.summary: Oliver Wyman argues AI agents need explicit governance, delegation, guardrails and controls when used to manage legacy IT systems at scale.

publications.title: Financial Services’ Future in AI Age: Known Unknown Debates
publications.summary: Oliver Wyman frames AI, regulation and geopolitics as linked debates shaping the future of financial institutions.
